detail: * 12x risk of severe cutaneous adverse reactions when taking antiepileptic drug phenytoin. * rs1057910(C;C) genotypes may clear drugs like celecoxib (trade name Celebrex) twice as slowly as rs1057910(A;A) genotypes; the rs1057910(A;C) genotypes are in-between clearance rates.
